# Rastermill

A small Node image pipeline with in-process Photon, native codec fallbacks, pixel-budget guards, and typed results for agent-facing media work.

Canonical documentation:
- Overview: https://rastermill.com/
- Configuration: https://rastermill.com/configuration.html
- probe: https://rastermill.com/probe.html
- transparency: https://rastermill.com/transparency.html
- encode: https://rastermill.com/encode.html
- Backends: https://rastermill.com/backends.html
- Error handling: https://rastermill.com/error-handling.html

Install:
- npm install rastermill

Source: https://github.com/openclaw/rastermill
